title: What Do Analysts Think About PSNY Stock Recent Downgrade
text: Cantor Fitzgerald downgraded PSNY to Underweight from Neutral on February 18, 2026 citing concerns about company's outlook. Downgrade driven by reduced delivery expectations with company lowering volume growth guidance to low double-digits, down from previous targets of 30-35% compound annual growth. Cantor projected this could result in 16% cut to 2026 revenue estimates. Additional factors included flagged capital needs and unclear autonomy strategy. On same day as downgrade, Polestar announced plans to launch four new vehicles by 2028 and expects 30% retail network expansion in 2026. Wall Street previously identified PSNY as one of best transportation stocks, but recent downgrade reflects skepticism about execution and growth prospects. Ratings show conflicting sentiments with some maintaining bullish positions while others recently downgraded, reflecting disagreement about company's valuation and future performance.
